evals.prompt: 使用 $clarifying-cybernetic-tasks 分析这个复杂需求。
evals.expected_output: Treat the old skill as a compatibility alias and route to $analyzing-cybernetic-requirements.
assertions: States or behaves as if $clarifying-cybernetic-tasks is a deprecated alias.
Creates or references docs/cybernetics/requirements/ rather than docs/cybernetics/clarifications/.
Does not create a solution design, goal, execution policy, review, runtime /goal, or implementation.
